full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H) by María and Sarah.

Dispase dissociation media included 14.55 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 300 µl Dispase + 150 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 13.35 ml DMEM/F12+++, 1.5 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 150 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

(1) RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 12 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 2 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: (1) RBC lysis with 4 ml for 5 min + 16 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 4x 5.9x10^6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 4x 5.0x10^6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E7 cells/ml] | 1,18 | 2,00
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 9,29 | 12,70
 | viability [%] | 78,4 | 63,7
 | size [µm] | 8,30 | 8,40
2) | total [E7 cells/ml] | 1,14 | 1,61
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 8,96 | 12,00
 | viability [%] | 78,7 | 74,6
 | size [µm] | 8,2 | 8,4
Average | [E7 cells/ml] | 1,16 | 1,81
 | total [E7 cells] | 2,32 | 5,415
 | viability [%] | 78,55 | 69,2
